meta.tagline: Institutions, healthcare aur business ke liye enterprise software.
meta.description: Cubico Technologies Pakistan ke institutions, healthcare providers aur barhti businesses ke liye enterprise-grade software banati hai.

home.heroTitle: Aisa software jo aap ke business ko aagay barhaye
home.heroSubtitle: Hospital management se le kar e-commerce website tak — aik aisi team jo waqai cheezain deliver karti hai.
home.trustStrip: 50+ teams ka bharosa · Pakistan · UAE · UK · USA
home.videoComingSoon: video jald hi aa rahi hai

footer.brandDesc: Websites, portals, CRMs aur marketing — duniya bhar ke businesses ke liye banaye gaye.

templates.metaDescription: Humari mukammal website templates ki library dekhein. Har industry, har style. Kisi bhi template par click karein live preview ke liye, phir minute mein apna project shuru karein.
templates.heroSubtitle: Aik starting point chunein. Har template working homepage aur supporting pages ke saath aati hai — baaqi hum customize kar dete hain.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Name, industry, ya tag se dhoondein…
templates.emptyTitle: "{query}" se koi template match nahi hua
templates.footerHintQuestion: Jo aap chahtay hain woh nahi mil raha?
templates.footerHintCta: Humein batayein kya chahiye — hum bana denge

service.featuresTitle: Har woh cheez jo aap ko chahiye
service.featuresSubtitle: Built-in features jo har workflow ko cover karte hain — box se nikaltay hi.
service.pricingSubtitle: Koi hidden fees nahi. Kabhi bhi cancel ya upgrade karein.
service.planWhatsappMessage: Salaam, mujhe {service} ke {plan} plan ke baaray mein mazeed jaannay mein dilchaspi hai
service.ctaReadySubtitle: Humein WhatsApp par message karein — hum aap ko mahinoon nahi, dinoon mein chala denge.

order.pickPlanSub: Jo aap ke liye theek ho — baad mein upgrade bhi kar saktay hain.
